name: Pina Colada Fruit Dip
recipeIngredient: 1 lb crushed pineapple in juice, undrained
2 packages instant coconut pudding mix (3.5 oz)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a food processor bowl with metal blade or blender container, combine all ingredients.
2. Cover; process for 30 seconds.
3. Refrigerate for several hours or overnight to blend flavors.
4. Serve with fresh fruit.
5. Makes 5 cups.
